svg.aria-label: Conditional endpoint velocity arrows averaged into an empirical local marginal-field estimate
svg.text: Local conditional arrows form an empirical field estimate
At t = 0.55, keep endpoint pairs whose interpolated point falls near the query, then average their velocities locally.
A. Select endpoint pairs near the query
Global view of interpolated points at the fixed time.
B. Average the nearby conditional directions
Zoomed query neighborhood; arrow lengths are scaled for readability.
black dots: the 26 nearest interpolated points among 5,000 sampled endpoint pairs
gray arrows: endpoint-conditioned velocity directions near the same local state
teal arrow: empirical local average, a finite-sample estimate rather than an exact marginal oracle
